name: Cash Loans Bear
description_short: Cash Loans Bear offers payday and installment loans up to $5,000 in Liberty Township, OH with same-day decisions and no minimum credit score requirement.
description_long:
Cash Loans Bear is a local lending service operating in Liberty Township, OH (and across Ohio) that specializes in short-term and medium-term cash loans for borrowers facing unexpected financial gaps. The company operates a physical storefront at 7570 Bales Street, Suite 410, and also accepts online applications. Founded as a direct lender focused on accessible credit, Cash Loans Bear markets itself as an alternative for borrowers who may struggle to qualify for traditional bank loans.

The company offers two primary loan products: payday loans (up to $1,000, terms of 91 days to 12 months) and installment loans (up to $5,000, terms of 2-48 months). Payday loans carry APRs of approximately 90%-160% with a $30 monthly maintenance fee structure, while installment loans feature lower APRs (25%-36%) with origination fees up to 2%. Loan amounts vary based on borrower eligibility and Ohio state lending law compliance. Both products are available through in-store or online applications, with approval decisions stated to be quick and funding available the next business day in some cases.

Cash Loans Bear distinguishes itself by emphasizing credit-score-independent lending decisions, focusing instead on current income and ability to repay. The company advertises no hard credit checks for most applicants, simple application processes, and extended business hours (8 a.m. to 10 p.m. daily, including weekends). Branch manager Frank Miranda handles the Liberty Township location, and customer reviews on their website cite simple applications, clear explanations of terms, and next-day funding.

However, prospective borrowers should recognize that these products carry very high APRs—particularly payday loans at 90%-160%—significantly above the 36% APR threshold defining predatory lending in many states. While Ohio permits these rates, borrowers taking payday loans should understand the true cost of borrowing. The company's claims of "no hidden fees" require scrutiny against disclosed finance charges. The positive reviews on their own website should be weighed against independent third-party feedback.
address: 7570 Bales St suite 410, Liberty Township, OH 45069

company_info.headquarters: 7570 Bales St suite 410, Liberty Township, OH 45069

pros: Quick approval decisions and next-day funding for most borrowers
No minimum credit score requirement; approval based on current income
Extended hours (8 a.m.–10 p.m. daily, including Sunday) for in-store access
In-person and online application options available
Installment loans (up to $5,000) offer structured repayment over 2-48 months
No hard credit check claimed for most applications
Simple application form reported to take minutes to complete
cons: Payday loan APRs of 90%-160% are substantially higher than most consumer lending alternatives
Limited loan amounts (max $1,000 for payday) may not cover larger emergencies
Website lacks information on state licensing, lending disclosures, or NMLS registration
Reviews displayed are self-hosted and lack independent third-party verification
Finance charges ($30 monthly on payday loans) add significant cost even on short-term borrowing
best_for: Borrowers with poor credit seeking fast emergency cash before next paycheck
Ohio residents needing $500-$1,500 in quick funds who cannot qualify for bank loans
Individuals preferring in-person application assistance with same-day decisions
Borrowers requiring structured monthly payments over longer terms via installment loans
diagnosis: Cash Loans Bear is best suited for Ohio residents with poor credit or no credit history who need emergency cash of $500-$1,500 within days and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans. The main caveat is that payday loans carry very high APRs (90%-160%), making them an expensive short-term borrowing option; borrowers should exhaust alternatives (credit union PALs, employer advances, emergency assistance programs) before using these products, as the true cost of borrowing is substantial.
services: Payday loans up to $1,000 (91 days to 12 months)
Installment loans up to $5,000 (2-48 month terms)
No hard credit pull (stated for most applicants)
Extended business hours (8 a.m.–10 p.m. daily)
Loan amount flexibility based on income verification
Origination fees up to 2% on installment loans
